context: Tests whether the agent uses AGENTS.md to identify that src/features/** maps to both docs/features.md and CHANGELOG.md, verifies CHANGELOG.md has an [Unreleased] entry for the new user-facing feature, adds one if missing, and leaves docs/internals.md untouched since no src/internal/** changes occurred.

checklist.name: Git diff used
checklist.description: Evidence that git diff --staged (or equivalent) was run to discover changed paths

checklist.name: AGENTS.md table consulted
checklist.description: The agent read AGENTS.md and identified the mappings for src/features/** (both docs/features.md and CHANGELOG.md)

checklist.name: CHANGELOG checked
checklist.description: The agent explicitly checked whether CHANGELOG.md has an entry under '## [Unreleased]' for the new feature

checklist.name: CHANGELOG entry added
checklist.description: CHANGELOG.md now contains a new entry under '## [Unreleased]' describing the bulk-delete feature

checklist.name: Correct CHANGELOG section
checklist.description: The new CHANGELOG entry is placed under '## [Unreleased]', not under a versioned section like [1.2.0]

checklist.name: docs/features.md checked
checklist.description: The agent checked docs/features.md and reported it as clean (it was already updated by the developer)

checklist.name: docs/internals.md untouched
checklist.description: docs/internals.md was not edited — no src/internal/** paths were in the diff

checklist.name: No code files modified
checklist.description: Source code files (src/**) were not edited

checklist.name: Report produced
checklist.description: A doc-sync-report.md file exists in the working directory

checklist.name: Report heading format
checklist.description: Report heading follows '## Doc sync — N paths changed' pattern

checklist.name: Report — generated artifacts section
checklist.description: Report contains a 'Generated artifacts' or 'CHANGELOG' section showing the result of the CHANGELOG check
